name: Footstep (Grass)
description: a soft muffled step on grass
usage: Per-step while walking on grass/foliage tiles.

ai.prompt: A single footstep on grass: a soft, muffled organic step with subtle blades rustling, close and natural. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
